name: Flows.app
description: Flows — no-code workflow builder with AI-native node types. Connects ChatGPT, Claude, Anthropic APIs, and SaaS tools visually.

when_to_use: Visual Claude API workflow without writing Python code
Connecting ChatGPT to a CRM via no-code node builder
AI-powered content pipeline triggered by form submissions
Multi-step automation linking SaaS tools with LLM reasoning
Non-technical team building AI enrichment workflows visually

pros: AI-native nodes for ChatGPT, Claude, etc
cons: Pricing can jump with AI usage
review.verdict: Promising visual LLM orchestrator but competes with Zapier AI, n8n, and Make in a crowded space.
review.best_for: Non-engineers building LLM-driven automations with SaaS integrations
review.not_for: Engineers who prefer code-first frameworks like LangChain or Temporal
